init_hook: echo "devbox shell active — run 'devbox run help' for shortcuts"

help: echo '  db:bootstrap Start Postgres, run migrations, and seed dev data'
echo '  db:up        Start Postgres (waits until healthy)'
echo '  db:reset     Stop Postgres and wipe the data volume'
echo '  seed         Seed the dev DB with a sample group and players'
echo '  dev:backend  Run backend dev server'
echo '  dev:frontend Run frontend dev server'
scripts.migrate: cd backend && cargo run --bin migrate up
scripts.db:bootstrap: docker compose -f backend/docker-compose.yml up -d --wait postgres && cd backend && cargo run --bin migrate up && cargo run --bin seed
